statement: Decision-ledger entries persist to repo-local .ledger/entries.jsonl when the decisions belong to the repo, with harness stores bound only via LOCAL.md.
because: spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-22-decision-ledger-design.md (method step 3); gauntlet run phase-c-skill-specs-2026-07-22 verdict CONDITIONAL; downstream consumer class: continuity-verify on resumption
